name: Syrah Resources Limited
description: Syrah Resources Limited is an Australian-based industrial minerals and technology company. The company's flagship project is the Balama Graphite Project in Mozambique, which is one of the world's largest and highest-grade flake graphite deposits. Syrah is also developing the Vidalia Active Anode Material (AAM) facility in Louisiana, USA, aiming to become a vertically integrated producer of natural graphite AAM for the global lithium-ion battery market. The company focuses on supplying high-quality graphite products to the electric vehicle and energy storage industries.

investment_theses.company_type: Graphite producer for Western anode supply chain
